options.name: --version
options.description: Display WiX Toolset version in use.

options.name: --acceptEula
options.description: Accept the EULA for this invocation without creating an acceptance file.

commands.name: build
commands.description: Build a wixlib, package, or bundle.

commands.name: accept
commands.description:
Accept the WiX OSMF EULA. This versions eulaId = wix7
For more information see: http://wixtoolset.org/

commands.name: msi
commands.description: Specialized operations for manipulating Windows Installer packages.

commands.name: burn
commands.description: Specialized operations for manipulating Burn-based bundles.

commands.name: convert
commands.description: Convert v3 source code to v4 source code.

commands.name: format
commands.description:
Ensure consistent formatting of source code.
Run 'wix [command] -h' for more information on a command.
For more information see: http://wixtoolset.org/
